basic_details.job_title: District & Sessions Judge Yamuna Nagar Peon Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 10 Posts
basic_details.short_information: District & Sessions Judge Yamuna Nagar has released the official Peon Notification 2026 on 28 May 2026 at the official website. A total of 10 vacancies have been announced under the Yamuna Nagar Peon Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged between 18 to 42 years with a qualification of Middle standard can apply offline from 28 May 2026 to 17 June 2026. The official notification PDF and application details are available below.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 42 years Age Relaxation: Scheduled Castes: 5 years Backward Classes: 5 years Disabled persons: 10 years (+5 years if PwD applicant belongs to S/Caste, S/Tribe, B/Classes, EWS Category) subject to maximum 52 years Ex-serviceman: extent of his military service added by three years Unmarried women: 5 years Wives of military personnel who are disabled: 5 years Widowed or legally divorced women: 5 years Judicially separated women: 5 years Persons who have already worked or presently working on adhoc/contract/work-charged/daily wages basis in any Department/ Board/ Corporation of Haryana Government: equal to the number of completed years only on equivalent post on adhoc/ contract/ work-charged/ daily wages basis excluding the period of break, if any, including any other age relaxation admissible, if any, subject to maximum age of 52 years

qualification.details: Middle standard examination from recognized Board Possess knowledge of Hindi/Punjabi

salary_details.details: Consolidated pay of Rs. 16,900/- per month, initially for a period of six months or till regular appointments are made, whichever is earlier.

selection_process: Selection will be made strictly in accordance with amended Rule 7 of the Haryana Subordinate Courts Establishment (Recruitment and General Conditions of Service) Rules
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for District & Sessions Judge Yamuna Nagar Peon Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://yamunanagar.dcourts.gov.in/notice-category/recruitments/.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
